anti_spillover_constraints: Do NOT implement backtest engine internals (deferred to T13)
Do NOT implement exit-rule execution logic of any kind
Do NOT implement reporting, formatting, or output-display logic (deferred to T16)
Do NOT implement signal generation or signal orchestration (deferred to T11)
Do NOT implement batch runner scaffolding (deferred to T14)
Do NOT extend schema models beyond SignalRecord and SelectionRecord usage
Do NOT introduce new fetch, normalization, or storage logic
Do NOT absorb responsibilities from T11, T13, T14, or T16 under any framing
acceptance_criteria: SelectionPipeline class accepts List[SignalRecord], returns List[SelectionRecord]
Filtering stage configurable via min_score and signal_type_whitelist
Ranking stage configurable via score_weights dict
Selection stage configurable via top_n integer and optional score cutoff
SelectionConfig is a dataclass(slots=True) with all required config fields
Filter, rank, select are independently callable and unit-testable
RankingModel and Selector protocol stubs from interfaces.py are wired in
Contract tests verify input/output types and required SelectionRecord fields
No backtest, exit-rule, or reporting logic is present in any T12 file
summary: T12 is well-scoped and ready for Planner. The stock selection pipeline is a standalone signal-to-candidate transformation module. Anti-spillover constraints clearly defined.
